markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Kaufland Hangry Knights and ROSSMANN Centaurs each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Kaufland Hangry Knights vs ROSSMANN Centaurs (BO3) - Prime League 1st Division Group A
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Kaufland Hangry Knights and ROSSMANN Centaurs in the Prime League 1st Division Group A, initially scheduled for April 29 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Kaufland Hangry Knights" if Kaufland Hangry Knights win the match against ROSSMANN Centaurs.

This market will resolve to "ROSSMANN Centaurs" if ROSSMANN Centaurs win the match against Kaufland Hangry Knights.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Kaufland Hangry Knights sit fourth in Prime League 1st Division Spring 2026 Group A with 3 points from a 1-2 maps record after yesterday's 1-2 BO3 loss to Unicorns of Love SE, underscoring urgency to rebound against bottom-placed ROSSMANN Centaurs, who remain winless at 0-2 maps following a 0-2 defeat to BIG on April 24. KHK holds head-to-head edge, claiming a 1-0 series win over Centaurs on April 9 amid early split struggles for both; stable rosters feature KHK's midlaner Abbedagge and ADC Exofeng driving macro plays, while Centaurs' jungler Pasu faces pressure in contested laning phases. Top 3 advance from single round-robin BO3s, amplifying stakes in this pivotal Week 5 matchup.

markets.question: Game 2: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 2. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves a Quadra Kill. A Penta Kill (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as a Quadra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether a Quadra Kill occurred prior to stoppage. If no Quadra Kill occurred, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Slay Baron Nashor?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay the Baron Nashor at least once during Game 1. Baron Nashor is a powerful neutral objective in League of Legends that first spawns at 20:00 game time and respawns 6 minutes after each death, granting the slaying team the Hand of Baron buff.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both LUA Gaming and Barça eSports each slay Baron Nashor at least once during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay Baron Nashor during Game 1.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain Baron Nashor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barça eSports enters their Week 4 LES 2026 Spring group stage BO3 against winless LUA Gaming with trader consensus reflecting superior form, sitting 3rd at 2-1 series (5-3 games) after a 2-1 comeback over UCAM Esports last week and a 2-0 rout of UB Alma Mater. LUA languishes 7th at 0-3 (0-6 games) on a three-series shutout streak, dropping 0-2 decisions to Movistar KOI Fénix, GIANTX Pride, and Los Heretics in recent weeks amid integration of new jungler Pegaso, ADC Kaii, and support TIMR since February. Historical head-to-head tilts toward Barça (5-3 overall), though LUA won their last meeting in November 2025; a victory is pivotal for both in the single round-robin chase for top-4 playoff spots.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Slay a Dragon?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 1. In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both LUA Gaming and Barça eSports each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 1. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain at least one elemental dragon prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Game 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Game 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all champion kills recorded during the match by both LUA Gaming and Barça eSports. Executions (deaths to non-champion sources such as turrets, minions, or neutral monsters where no enemy champion receives kill credit) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Game 2, or if Game 2 is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:

In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both NRG Esports and Citadel Gaming each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 1. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

markets.question: Game 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:

markets.question: Will Trump say "Obliterated" or "Obliteration" during King Charles visit?
markets.description:
King Charles is scheduled to visit the White House from April 27 to April 30, 2026 (https://time.com/article/2026/04/01/king-charles-camilla-royal-state-visit-washington-america-trump/). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump says the listed term during his appearance at events featuring King Charles from April 27 through April 30, 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

This market is explicitly about events featuring both Donald Trump and King Charles from April 27 through April 30, 2026. All such events featuring both on these dates count. Speeches, events, or comments which feature one named individual but not the other, will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the events contain a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

If this visit is definitively cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

High-stakes matchup for the sole NA main event slot tests roster depth, map pool mastery, and adaptation to the current patch meta, with Sentinels' 85.7% qualifier win rate signaling trader favoritism toward their consistency.

markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 43.5 in Game 3?
markets.description:
In the upcoming Grand final match between Sentinels and FlyQuest in the Esports World Cup North America Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 29 at 2:10PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 3.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 3 is 44 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Sentinels vs FlyQuest (BO5) - Esports World Cup North America Qualifier Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL Grand final match between Sentinels and FlyQuest in the Esports World Cup North America Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 29 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Sentinels" if Sentinels win the match against FlyQuest.

This market will resolve to "FlyQuest" if FlyQuest win the match against Sentinels.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Will JD Vance say "King" or "Queen" on the Will Cain Show?
markets.description:
JD Vance is scheduled to appear on the Will Cain Show on April 29, 2026. You can read more about that here: https://x.com/WillCainShow/status/2049245211012870401

This market will resolve to "Yes" if JD Vance says the listed term during this appearance. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

If clips of old interviews or prerecorded videos are aired where Vance is speaking, those clips will count toward this market's resolution.

Any usage of the term regardless of context will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market, however other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this interview is definitively cancelled by JD Vance or the Will Cain Show, or otherwise is not released by April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No". If the interview has not aired in its entirety by April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on what has aired up to that point.

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution. Transcripts will not count.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vice President JD Vance joined Fox News' The Will Cain Show today at 4 p.m. ET for an exclusive interview, addressing the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner security breach over the weekend, where he was urgently evacuated from the ballroom amid reports of a suspected gunman. He criticized Minnesota Governor Tim Walz's handling of a sprawling fraud scandal involving over $600 million in suspended payments to California-linked home health agencies, vowing probes into state officials' knowledge and potential criminal accountability, including immigration fraud and denaturalization. Vance urged Democrats to tone down rhetoric amid rising political violence and reflected on rediscovering his Christian faith through family life. Full broadcast review determines exact phrasing for market resolution by April 30.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Singapore be 28°C on May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Singapore Changi Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 1 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Singapore Changi Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/sg/singapore/WSSS.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Meteorological Service Singapore's (MSS) latest outlooks project daily maximum temperatures of 33–34°C during the April–May 2026 inter-monsoon period, with potential to exceed 35°C amid light variable winds, driving trader sentiment toward 32–33°C as leading outcomes for May 1. Persistent late-April highs above 34°C on multiple days highlight the baseline warmth from urban heat island effects and ENSO-neutral conditions transitioning toward weak El Niño, but frequent intense afternoon thundery showers—often localised moderate to heavy—introduce key uncertainty differentiating the closely matched probabilities. Early or widespread cloud cover could cap peaks at 32°C, while patchy late-day rain permits 33°C; upcoming 24-hour forecast refinements will clarify model consensus on shower timing.

markets.question: Amiens SC vs. Red Star FC: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 2 game between Amiens SC and Red Star FC, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Amiens SC and Red Star FC combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue2.fr. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Amiens SC vs. Red Star FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Ligue 2 game, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amiens SC, mired in 18th place in Ligue 2 with a dismal home record featuring just two wins from 15 matches, hosts fifth-placed Red Star FC on May 2 in a crucial relegation scrap. Amiens' recent form underscores their woes—a 0-1 home defeat to Pau FC on April 10, a 1-1 draw at Bastia three days prior, and ongoing absences of attacking midfielder Victor Lobry (cruciate ligament tear since November) and left-back Arvin Appiah (Achilles injury). Red Star enters with momentum from a 4-3 win over Bastia, solidifying their playoff push despite Amiens' 3-1 victory in the reverse fixture last August. Head-to-head favors Amiens (7 wins in 13), but Red Star's superior goal difference and depth tilt trader consensus amid late-season stakes.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy entered the United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket quarterfinal as Group A winners with a perfect 2-0 record, leveraging a fresh February roster of Aliot, Kragh, aZe, ta9z, and sh1Fu despite a 37.5% win rate and recent European Pro League Series 6 losses to HEROIC Academy and Hashiras. markets.question: Will 3 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the exact amount of cuts of 25 basis points in 2026 by the Fed (including any cuts made during the December meeting).

Emergency rate cuts outside of scheduled FOMC meetings will also count toward the total number of cuts in 2026. This market will remain open until December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, to account for any such emergency actions.

For example, if the Fed cuts rates by 50 bps after a meeting, it would be considered 2 cuts (of 25 bps each).

This market will resolve early to "No" if the specified number of cuts becomes impossible — i.e., if more cuts have already occurred than the strike in question.

Note that cuts between 1–24 bps (inclusive) will also be considered 1 rate cut.

The resolution source for this market will be FOMC statements after meetings scheduled in 2026 according to the official calendar: https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm. The level and change of the target federal funds rate is also published at the official website of the Federal Reserve at https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders price a 57.8% implied probability for zero Fed rate cuts (0 bps) in 2026—the consensus view backed by real capital—driven by sticky inflation and robust labor data offsetting earlier easing bets. March 2026 CPI spiked 0.9% month-over-month to 3.3% year-over-year, fueled by a 10.9% energy surge from Middle East war-related oil shocks, while core CPI edged to 2.6% y/y; nonfarm payrolls rose 178,000 with unemployment steady at 4.3% and jobless claims near 214,000. Hawkish March FOMC minutes flagged hike risks, prompting Wells Fargo and JPMorgan to scrap cut forecasts. Today's April 29 policy hold at 3.5%-3.75% and Powell's comments could cement steady rates through year-end.

markets.question: X banned in any European country by December 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the use of X/Twitter is banned within any European country by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market, a “European country” is defined as any of the following sovereign states: Albania, Andorra, Austria, Belarus, Belgium, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czechia, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Georgia, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Kosovo, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Moldova, Monaco, Montenegro, Netherlands, North Macedonia, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Romania, San Marino, Serbia, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Turkey, Ukraine, United Kingdom, and Vatican City.

A ban will qualify if legislation is enacted or government action is taken to bar the respective country's citizens from downloading and/or viewing X/Twitter, and/or posting on X/Twitter. Any legislation or government action that meets these standards will qualify, regardless of whether or when the ban goes into effect.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the respective government and X/Twitter; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 67% implied probability against X facing a ban in any European country by year-end, driven by the European Commission's ongoing Digital Services Act (DSA) enforcement prioritizing fines over outright prohibitions. A €120 million penalty in December 2025 for verification transparency lapses prompted X's legal challenge in February 2026 and compliance plan submission by March, with financial guarantees secured in early April—escalations that have stabilized without ban threats. DSA remedies emphasize progressive penalties up to 6% of global revenue for very large platforms like X, reserving bans for extreme non-compliance, amid X's geo-restrictions and content moderation adaptations. Key catalysts ahead include court rulings on the fine and potential new DSA probes, though historical precedent favors sustained operations.

Rain risk could factor into play, keeping this a toss-up reflected in trader consensus.

markets.question: Spread: AJ Auxerre (-2.5)

markets.question: Will Opendoor (OPEN) close at $2.00-$3.00 on the final day of trading of the week of Apr 27 – May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the official closing price for Opendoor (OPEN) on the final day of trading of the specified week (normally Friday).

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

If the final session of the week is shortened (for example, due to a market-holiday schedule), the official closing price published for that shortened session will still be used for resolution.

If no official closing price is published for that session (for example, due to a trading halt into the close, system issue, delisting, or other disruption), the market will use the last valid on-exchange trade price of the regular session as the effective closing price.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Yahoo Finance.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Yahoo Finance after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Yahoo Finance, specifically the Opendoor (OPEN) "Close" prices available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/OPEN/history, published under "Historical Prices."

markets.question: Will Gold (XAUUSD) hit (HIGH) $5,000 in April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during April 2026, any 1-minute candle for Gold (XAUUSD) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the applicable trading session as listed on Pyth will be considered. Under the standard schedule, trading is open from 6:00:00 PM ET Sunday through 5:00:00 PM ET Friday, with a daily break from 5:00:00 PM ET to 6:00:00 PM ET, except where modified by holiday or special-session hours as listed on Pyth.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

If Gold (XAUUSD) does not trade at all during the listed time frame, this market will resolve to "No".

In the event of a contract specification change, feed change, or similar structural modification affecting the market during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Gold (XAUUSD) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Metal.XAU%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter.

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published for the relevant CME COMEX futures contract for the underlying metal—COMEX Gold Futures (GC)—may be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will Anthropic have the highest estimated revenue for Apr 27–May 3, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the model family that has the highest total estimated inference revenue based on Anera's data published at https://anera.markets/intelligence/model-family for the specified week.

The week’s values will be determined by summing the respective companies' estimated revenue figures for each day within the specified period. If data for all specified days is not released by 7:00 PM ET on the second day following the final date, this market will resolve based on data available at that time. Entries labeled “Other” will not be considered a model family for the purposes of this market. Revisions to published data will be considered only until all relevant data for the specified period has been released.

Model families will be ranked primarily by their total estimated inference revenue over the specified seven-day period, with alphabetical order of model family names as listed in this market group used as a tiebreaker (e.g., if two model families are exactly tied, “Anthropic” would be ranked ahead of “OpenAI”). This market will resolve based on the model family that occupies first place under this ranking.

The resolution source for this market is data published by Anera Intelligence at https://anera.markets/intelligence/model-family. If the relevant data for the full period is not available by 7:00 PM ET on the second day following the final date, this market will resolve based on data available at that time. If this resolution source is unavailable, this market will remain open until the data becomes available and will resolve based on the first subsequent check.

markets.question: Will the Ethiopian Citizens for Social Justice (EZEMA) win the most seats in the 2026 Ethiopian general election?

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Ethiopian House of Peoples' Representatives election.

In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

eventMetadata.context_description: **Prosperity Party's 94.5% implied probability in the Ethiopia parliamentary election market reflects trader consensus on its overwhelming incumbency advantage under the first-past-the-post system, reinforced by the National Election Board of Ethiopia's (NEBE) recent milestone of registering over 50.5 million voters as of late April ahead of the June 1 vote.** Ongoing armed conflicts in Amhara, Oromia, and Tigray—exemplified by the Tigray People's Liberation Front's (TPLF) April 20 announcement restoring its regional parliament and challenging the federal peace deal—have crippled opposition mobilization for challengers like NaMA, EZEMA, GPDP, and TPLF. Echoing its 2021 landslide, Prosperity Party benefits from fragmented rivals amid repression claims and calls for electoral reforms by coalitions, yet no unified front has emerged. Realistic challenges include nationwide violence postponing polls, a major opposition boycott eroding legitimacy, or surprise international intervention, though NEBE vows to proceed despite regional insecurity.

markets.question: Club Universitario de Deportes vs. Club Nacional de Football: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Copa Libertadores game between Club Universitario de Deportes and Club Nacional de Football, scheduled for April 29 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Club Universitario de Deportes and Club Nacional de Football combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on conmebollibertadores.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Will Piper Sandler (PIPR) beat quarterly earnings?
markets.description:
As of market creation, Piper Sandler is estimated to release earnings on May 1, 2026. The Street consensus estimate for Piper Sandler’s non-GAAP EPS for the relevant quarter is $0.92 as of market creation. This market will resolve to "Yes" if Piper Sandler reports non-GAAP EPS greater than $0.92 for the relevant quarter in its next quarterly earnings release. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No." The resolution source will be the non-GAAP EPS listed in the company’s official earnings documents. 

If Piper Sandler releases earnings without non-GAAP EPS, then the market will resolve according to the non-GAAP EPS figure reported by SeekingAlpha. If no such figure is published within 96h of market close (4:00:00pm ET) on the day earnings are announced, the market will resolve according to the GAAP EPS listed in the company’s official earnings documents; or, if not published there, according to the GAAP EPS provided by SeekingAlpha. If no GAAP EPS number is available from either source at that time, the market will resolve to “No.” (For the purposes of this market, GAAP EPS refers to diluted GAAP EPS, unless it is not published, in which case it refers to basic GAAP EPS.)

If the company does not release earnings within 45 calendar days of the estimated earnings date, this market will resolve to “No.” 

Note: Subsequent restatements, corrections, or revisions made to the initially announced non-GAAP EPS figure will not qualify for resolution, except in the case of obvious and immediate mistakes (e.g., fat finger errors, as with Lyft's (LYFT) earnings release in February 2024).
Note: The strike prices used in these markets are derived from SeekingAlpha estimates, and reflect the consensus of sell-side analyst estimates for non-GAAP EPS.
Note: All figures will be rounded to the nearest cent using standard rounding.
Note: For the purposes of this market, IFRS EPS will be treated as GAAP EPS.
Note: If multiple versions of non-GAAP EPS are published, the market will resolve according to the primary headline non-GAAP EPS number, which is typically presented on a diluted basis. If diluted is not published, then basic non-GAAP EPS will qualify.
Note: All figures are expressed in USD, unless otherwise indicated.
Note: For primarily internationally listed companies, this market refers specifically to the shares traded in the United States on U.S. stock exchanges such as the NYSE or Nasdaq. In cases where the company trades in the U.S. through an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) or American Depositary Share (ADS), this market will refer to the ADR/ADS.

markets.question: Gensyn FDV above $1.5B one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Gensyn's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Gensyn (https://x.com/gensynai) doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "FC Barcelona" if FC Barcelona win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FC Bayern München".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Barcelona vs. FC Bayern München - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona Femení hold a commanding position in Liga F with a near-perfect 24-0-1 record, propelled by recent thumpings of Real Madrid including a 3-0 quarter-final win on March 29 to secure their UEFA Women's Champions League semi-final spot against Bayern Frauen. Bayern, unbeaten domestically this season atop the Frauen-Bundesliga save for a 7-1 group-stage drubbing by Barcelona in October 2025, advanced via a gritty 5-3 aggregate over Manchester City with late strikes from Viggósdóttir and Dallmann. First leg on April 25 in Munich favors Bayern's home crowd and revenge motive, but Barcelona's depth shines despite Aitana Bonmatí's ongoing fibula absence until early May; Bayern miss winger Klara Bühl (muscle injury). Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

markets.question: Will Giannis Antetokounmpo play for the Atlanta Hawks in 2026-27?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the next team Giannis Antetokounmpo officially joins by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo does not officially join a new team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Milwaukee Bucks”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo retires or is not under contract with any professional team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

An official acquisition announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the Milwaukee Bucks and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

markets.question: T20 Series Bangladesh vs Sri Lanka, Women: Bangladesh vs Sri Lanka
markets.description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Bangladesh and Sri Lanka scheduled for April 30 2026 in T20 Series Bangladesh vs Sri Lanka, Women.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Sri Lanka Women hold a 1-0 lead in the three-match T20I series after a dominant 56-run victory in the 1st T20I at Sylhet International Cricket Stadium, where Harshitha Samarawickrama's 61 and Imesha Dulani's 55 powered them to 161/4, while Bangladesh Women collapsed to 105/6 chasing, losing early wickets despite Shorna Akter's unbeaten 36. Building momentum from their 2-1 ODI series win—capped by a 7-wicket triumph in the 3rd ODI—Sri Lanka's superior head-to-head record (11-2 in 13 T20Is) and Chamari Athapaththu's all-round contributions (32 & 2/14) underline trader consensus favoring them. Bangladesh's top-order fragility persists as a key vulnerability ahead of the 2nd and 3rd T20Is on April 30 and May 2 in Sylhet, with pitch conditions likely favoring pace in night games.

markets.question: Will Jonas Wind be the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which player will finish as the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season.

If the listed player finishes as the sole top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season, the market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

Goals scored in Bundesliga matches only will count. Goals in other competitions (e.g., DFB-Pokal, German Super Cup, Champions League, Europa League, international matches) will not count for this market.

If multiple players tie for the top goal scorer, the market will resolve to the player whose last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2025–26 Bundesliga season is canceled or not completed by August 1, 2026, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official statistics from the Bundesliga. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Harry Kane's insurmountable 33-goal lead after 28 Bundesliga appearances, cemented by strikes in Bayern Munich's title-clinching 4-2 win over Stuttgart on April 19 and follow-up versus Mainz on April 25, drives his 99.5% implied probability as top goalscorer. Trailing challengers like Deniz Undav (18 goals) and Mohammed Amoura (8 goals) lack the matches—four remaining, including Bayern's home date with Heidenheim—to close a 15-goal gap, even via hat-tricks every outing. Bayern's secured Bundesliga crown reduces pressure, with Kane injury-free per recent reports. Realistic threats demand his extended absence alongside rivals' historic scoring surges, improbable given form and fixture strength.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy holds a clear edge over Wave Esports in this Exort Series #25 Main Stage BO3 Swiss Round 1 clash, driven by their dominant 3-0 Contenders Stage run with +23 round differential versus Wave's scrappier 3-1 qualification. The young Spirit Academy roster—IGL VILBy, mazay, Kiryasoo, kidofpain, and s1nside—boasts recent C-tier momentum, including wins over Betera and 33, reflecting superior synergy and map control on Dust2 and Mirage. Wave, ranked lower at HLTV #149 with a 37.5% win rate over recent months, shows inconsistencies against similar foes like BIG Academy, heightening upset risk through strong pistol rounds or eco plays, but trader consensus favors Spirit's academy depth for playoffs advancement in this online European CS2 event.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 240-259 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket clusters around 1080-1119 posts (10.1% implied probability) for Elon Musk's X activity in May 2026, reflecting uncertainty over his posting cadence after March's resolved total of 1320-1359 (averaging 43 daily) gave way to April's slower weeks at 200-219 (April 17-24) and 158 so far (April 24-May 1, ~26 daily). Recent viral engagements, like high-volume days exceeding 70 posts amid pop culture buzz and xAI announcements, contrast with quieter periods tied to SpaceX milestones, creating tight competition among 1000-1200 ranges. Key swing factors include potential election-year news cycles or platform algorithm tweaks boosting frequency, with daily averages of 25-40 historically volatile; traders eye early May data for momentum shifts before month-end resolution.

markets.question: Will ByteDance have the top AI model at the end of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model with the highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolves based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Anthropic's recent Claude Opus 4.7 release on April 16 propelled it to the top of the LM Arena Text Arena Overall leaderboard under style control on, cementing a 50.5% trader consensus for retaining the highest rank by June 30 amid demonstrated superior reasoning and creative capabilities in crowdsourced battles. Google's aggressive push, including new AI agent tools unveiled April 22, keeps Gemini a close second at 30%, leveraging its vast compute resources and multimodal strengths for potential overtakes. OpenAI's GPT-5.5 launch shortly after failed to surpass on key benchmarks, dropping odds to 8.5%, while Chinese labs like DeepSeek (3.5%) and Z.ai (2.1%) gain traction with efficient open models like GLM-5.1. Traders eye imminent releases and leaderboard shifts before resolution.

markets.question: Will Reform UK win the most seats in the 2026 Scottish Parliament election?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Scotland on May 7, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the Scottish Parliament  in this election.

If voting in the Scottish parliamentary election does not occur by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition which received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party or coalition in the Welsh Parliament. 

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Welsh government, specifically the the Electoral Commission of Scotland (https://www.electoralcommission.org.uk/).

eventMetadata.context_description: With the May 7 Scottish Parliament election one week away, trader consensus overwhelmingly favors the Scottish National Party as the winner with the most seats, implied by 99.1% pricing that reflects sustained double-digit leads in constituency and regional list voting intentions. Latest Survation polls from mid-to-late April show SNP at 35-38% on constituency votes ahead of Reform UK (20%) and Scottish Labour (18-20%), while MRP projections from YouGov, JL Partners, and More in Common award SNP 56-67 seats—well clear of Reform UK's 16-22. Labour and Conservatives continue post-2024 Westminster losses collapse, fragmenting opposition votes under the additional member system. Despite Reform's surge, scenarios like a major SNP scandal, leadership gaffe, or turnout surge against incumbents could theoretically challenge this, though stability in final polls minimizes such risks.

eventMetadata.context_description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom leads trader consensus at 27% implied probability for the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination, driven by recent California primary polls showing him ahead of Kamala Harris by double digits and strong youth support in national surveys from mid-April 2026. Harris holds second at 7.5% following her April 10 National Action Network remarks signaling active consideration of another White House bid, bolstering her residual name recognition despite 2024 defeat. Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez trails at 8.6% on appeal to progressive and young voters amid shadow primary buzz. The fragmented field reflects post-2024 uncertainty, with governors like Newsom differentiated by executive records, Harris by vice-presidential incumbency, and Ocasio-Cortez by grassroots energy; 2026 midterms, fundraising hauls, and early-state organizing could consolidate support behind one contender.

markets.question: Will Gold (GC) hit (HIGH) $6,200 by end of June?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, on any trading day, the official CME settlement price for the Active Month (front month) of Gold (GC) futures is equal to or above the listed price by the final trading day of June 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

For CME Gold (GC) futures contracts, the Active Month is the nearest of CME's designated delivery-cycle months (February, April, June, August, October, December) that is not the spot month. The Active Month changes automatically on the contract's First Position Date, at which point the next eligible contract month becomes the Active Month.

Only the Active Month's official settlement price published by CME Group will be considered. Intraday trades, highs, lows, bids, offers, midpoint values, or indicative prices do not count.

Note that the settlement price may differ from the last traded price. CME's methodology to determine the settlement price can vary by commodity and contract.

Only days on which CME publishes an official settlement price for the Active Month will be included. Days without settlement prices (weekends, holidays, or market closures) are ignored.

This market will resolve based on the settlement price as it appears on the CME settlement page at the time it is first published for that trading day, regardless of any later corrections or updates.

The resolution source for this market is the CME Group website — specifically, the daily "Settlement" price for the Active Month of Gold (GC) futures.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gold June 2026 futures traded at $4,562 on April 29, capping a 3% weekly pullback from $4,700 amid firmer U.S. dollar and 10-year Treasury yields climbing to 4.35% post the Federal Reserve's April 28-29 FOMC decision to hold rates steady. This reflects trader repricing of persistent inflation and delayed rate-cut expectations, boosting real yields that pressure non-yielding gold. Polymarket's aggregated sentiment implies 49% odds of the active-month GC settlement hitting $4,900 or higher by June's end, with virtual certainty above $4,600, balancing central bank buying against macroeconomic headwinds. Key catalysts ahead: April CPI on May 12 and June 16-17 FOMC, where inflation trajectory could sway rate path pricing.

markets.question: Will Stephanie Luciano win by KO or TKO?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Stephanie Luciano defeats Carol Foro at UFC Fight Night: Adesanya vs. Pyfer, scheduled for March 28, 2026, by KO or TKO, including referee stoppage, doctor stoppage, or corner stoppage. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If the fight ends in a draw or by disqualification (either fighter), it will resolve "No."

eventMetadata.context_description: State Rep. Manny Rutinel's commanding 87.5% trader consensus in the June 30 Colorado's 8th Congressional District Democratic primary stems from recent momentum, including SEIU Colorado's endorsement on April 28 bolstering his labor support and fundraising edge reported April 20. eventMetadata.context_description: CA Platense hosts Independiente Santa Fe in Copa Libertadores Group E action on April 29 at Estadio Ciudad de Vicente López, their first-ever head-to-head matchup amid a competitive group featuring Peñarol and Corinthians. Santa Fe enters with mixed recent form in Colombian Primera A, sitting 13th after a 0-1 loss to Llaneros FC on April 1 but unbeaten in the prior four league games (two wins, two draws), showing solid away resilience with wins over Bucaramanga and Independiente Medellín. Platense, mid-table in Argentine Primera División, grapples with key injuries including centre-back Gonzalo Goñi (Achilles rupture, out until August), midfielder Iván Gómez (hamstring), forward Héctor Bobadilla (bruise), and winger Franco Minerva (strain), potentially weakening their defensive depth and attack. Home advantage and travel fatigue for Santa Fe could sway trader consensus in this evenly poised continental opener.

Territory under the administration of the Republic of China, including any inhabited islands, will qualify; however, uninhabited islands will not qualify. 

The resolution source for this market will be official confirmation by China, Taiwan, the United Nations, or any permanent member of the UN Security Council; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices "No" at 85.5% implied probability for a Chinese invasion of Taiwan by June 30, 2027, driven by a March US intelligence assessment concluding Beijing lacks current plans or detailed preparations for such action, citing prohibitive economic costs from disrupting global trade and Taiwan's semiconductor dominance, alongside PLA readiness gaps from ongoing anticorruption purges of senior officers. Recent developments show no escalation, with routine PLA warships spotted near Penghu islands on April 27 prompting Taiwanese alerts but no blockade signals, and China describing daily patrols as justified sovereignty measures. Diplomatic coercion continues, including airspace blocks on President Lai's travel, while Taiwan debates defense budget hikes amid espionage concerns, underscoring persistent deterrence amid high amphibious assault barriers.

markets.question: Will the lowest temperature in Paris be 10°C on April 29?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the lowest temperature recorded at the Paris-Le Bourget Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 29 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the lowest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Paris-Le Bourget Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/fr/bonneuil-en-france/LFPB.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Météo-France observations confirm Paris's lowest temperature on April 29 hit 13°C early morning amid thick cloud cover that suppressed radiative cooling overnight, solidifying trader consensus at 100% implied probability for this outcome. Morning bulletins reported ambient lows of 12–13°C across the Île-de-France region, aligning with ECMWF and GFS model ensembles projecting minima in the 10–13°C range prior to observations. Daytime highs nearing 24°C under partly cloudy skies further rule out colder readings, consistent with April's climatological average low of about 7°C but elevated by recent mild Atlantic flows. Resolution hinges on final data from official stations like Montsouris; an improbable late-night dip below 13°C or measurement revision could challenge it, though diurnal patterns make this unlikely.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the open-seat NJ-12 Democratic primary set for June 2, trader consensus slightly favors Adam Hamawy at 44% amid a fragmented 13-candidate field, propelled by his Q1 fundraising lead of $547,000 raised—$140,000 ahead of Sue Altman—and Elijah Dixon's April 21 dropout endorsement, consolidating progressive support from Justice Democrats and pro-Palestine groups. Verlina Reynolds-Jackson trails closely at 38% bolstered by the Communications Workers of America endorsement on April 9, appealing to union-heavy voters, while mayoral experience positions Adrian Mapp and others like Tennille McCoy and Brad Cohen near 30%, splitting moderate lanes. Recent Princeton and Rider debates highlighted divides on housing, AI regulation, and Israel policy—such as Altman's criticism of Hamawy's Iron Dome stance—keeping the race tight without public polls or county party endorsements; late consolidations, outside spending, or turnout in Mercer and Somerset counties could tip the balance.

markets.question: Will Khamenei post 10-14 posts from April 24 to May 1, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Khamenei (@khamenei_ir), posts on X between April 24, 12:00 PM ET and May 1, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

The resolution source for this market is the "Post Counter" figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors fewer than five posts from Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's official X account (@khamenei_ir) during April 24–May 1, driven by the account's complete inactivity since at least mid-February 2026, following reports of the Supreme Leader's martyrdom in U.S.-Israel strikes and his son Mojtaba Khamenei's ascension amid severe injuries. Recent developments, including April 18 messages issued via national media on the Iranian Army anniversary and April 23 assessments of Mojtaba's limited decision-making capacity due to facial burns and leg trauma requiring prosthetics, underscore constrained public communications. With no posts in the period so far as of April 29 and ongoing recovery, traders see minimal risk of elevated activity before May 1 resolution.

markets.question: Will Xiaomi have the second-best Coding AI model at the end of April 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab for "Coding" is checked on April 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Coding" Leaderboard tab at https://arena.ai/leaderboard/text/coding-no-style-control with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will Alex Lawson win the 2026 Ottawa mayoral election?
markets.description:
The 2026 Ottawa mayoral election is currently scheduled to be held on October 26, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who becomes the next mayor of Ottawa as a result of this election.

Temporary, interim, or placeholder mayors appointed before the election will not be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting; however, if there is any ambiguity in the results, this market will resolve according to official information from Ottawa.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Mayor Mark Sutcliffe leads trader consensus at 63.5% implied probability for the October 26, 2026 Ottawa municipal election, buoyed by strong name recognition and historical incumbency advantages in first-past-the-post municipal races, where re-election rates exceed 70% amid fragmented opposition. A Liaison Strategies poll of 1,000 voters (April 11-12) shows him ahead 46%-37% over challenger Jeff Leiper among decided voters, but with roughly half undecided and disapproval exceeding 50% on key issues like transit (71%), housing affordability (54%), and traffic (57%), signaling vulnerabilities that could narrow if challengers consolidate. Leiper (20.5%) gains from his Kitchissippi councillor profile, while Catherine McKenney (5%) and Alex Lawson (4.5%) split progressive and west-end votes; nominations open soon, with high undecideds poised to sway based on campaign momentum.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in London be 22°C or higher on April 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 30 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors 19°C (42.5%) and 18°C (36.5%) as London's highest temperature on April 30, reflecting the latest Met Office forecast of a maximum around 21°C under sunny skies with easterly winds gusting to 30 mph, while BBC Weather implies 20°C amid a gentle breeze. The close odds stem from scientific uncertainty in short-range temperature peaks, where gusty winds enhance evaporative cooling and limit surface heating despite ample solar insolation from clear skies—potentially capping actual readings 1-2°C below model peaks at sites like Heathrow. Historical late-April averages hover near 15-16°C, but continental high-pressure steering warmer air; overnight GFS and ECMWF updates could refine this before resolution.

markets.question: Will Arouca qualify for the League Phase of the 2026-27 UEFA Conference League?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed team clinches a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League per UEFA rules. Otherwise, the associated market will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to clinch a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League (e.g. they cannot mathematically achieve a Conference League place, cannot qualify through play in European or cup competitions, etc.), the associated market will resolve to "No". 

If the 2025-26 Primeira Liga season is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, or the teams that qualified for the 2026-27 Conference League have not been officially confirmed by UEFA within that timeframe, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA and/or the Primeira Liga; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
